testcase.name: ninguna_interfaz_acaba_en_impl
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Architecture Violation [Priority: MEDIUM] - Rule 'classes that are interfaces should have simple name not ending with 'Repository'' was violated (14 times): Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaReservaParkingRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (JpaReservaParkingRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaReservaParkingViewRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (JpaReservaParkingViewRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaTipoEstacionamientoRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (JpaTipoEstacionamientoRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.application.port.ReservasParkingReadRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (ReservasParkingReadRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.application.port.ReservasParkingWriteRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (ReservasParkingWriteRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.application.port.TipoEstacionamientoReadRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (TipoEstacionamientoReadRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaReservaVueloRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (JpaReservaVueloRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaReservaVueloViewRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (JpaReservaVueloViewRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaVueloRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (JpaVueloRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.application.port.ReservasVueloReadRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (ReservasVueloReadRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.application.port.ReservasVueloRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (ReservasVueloRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.application.port.ReservasVueloWriteRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (ReservasVueloWriteRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.application.port.VuelosReadRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (VuelosReadRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.application.port.VuelosRepository> has simple name ending with 'Repository' in (VuelosRepository.java:0) at com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule$Assertions.assertNoViolation(ArchRule.java:94) at com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule$Assertions.check(ArchRule.java:86) at com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule$Factory$SimpleArchRule.check(ArchRule.java:165) at com.tngtech.archunit.lang.syntax.ObjectsShouldInternal.check(ObjectsShouldInternal.java:81) at com.tngtech.archunit.junit.internal.ArchUnitTestDescriptor$ArchUnitRuleDescriptor.execute(ArchUnitTestDescriptor.java:168) at com.tngtech.archunit.junit.internal.ArchUnitTestDescriptor$ArchUnitRuleDescriptor.execute(ArchUnitTestDescriptor.java:151) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at
